_scoring_prompt:
CANDIDATE: Shashwat Mahajan
STATUS: Final year B.Tech student, interning as Generative AI Engineer
EDUCATION: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering in Computer Science Engineering from Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering, Nagpur
GRADUATION: 2027 batch | CGPA: 8.00 / 10
EXPERIENCE LEVEL: fresher (max 2 years)

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
Python, Java, JavaScript, LLMs, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Prompt Engineering, RAGAS, HuggingFace, Vector Embeddings, ChromaDB, XGBoost, FastAPI, Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS S3, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, WebSockets, AWS (Bedrock, AgentCore, S3), Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL, React.js, Node.js, SMOTE, BeautifulSoup, Brevo SMTP, Groq API, Ollama

COMPETITIVE PROGRAMMING:
LeetCode: 1538 rating, 400+ problems solved
CodeChef: 2-Star Coder


KEY PROJECTS:
- JobIntel Agent: A multi-agent CrewAI pipeline for job discovery and matching Stack: Python, CrewAI, LangChain, Playwright, SendGrid, LinkedIn/Indeed/Naukri APIs, Vector Embeddings. Intent-based job matching using semantic vector embeddings; Automated end-to-end intelligence delivery via SendGrid email report
- Financial Analyst RAG System: A production RAG pipeline for real-time multi-company financial analysis Stack: Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, HuggingFace, RAGAS, AWS S3, GitHub Actions. Applied RAGAS evaluation framework to benchmark retrieval faithfulness and answer relevance; Engineered HuggingFace query-expansion for cross-company comparison accuracy
- Credit Risk Assessment System: A full-stack ML system for credit risk assessment Stack: React.js, FastAPI, XGBoost, Docker, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Investigated severe class imbalance in a 10,000-record credit dataset using SMOTE oversampling; Trained XGBoost classifier achieving 88% accuracy
- AWS Bedrock AgentCore Agent: A stateful AI agent using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph Stack: Python, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Docker, FastAPI, XGBoost, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Built and deployed a stateful AI agent using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph; Implemented AgentCore Memory for persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval

WORK EXPERIENCE:
- Generative AI Engineer Intern at Technical Hub (Jan 2026 – Present): Designed and shipped LangChain-based RAG pipelines serving live end users; applied systematic prompt evaluation and failure analysis to reduce hallucination rates

ACHIEVEMENTS: LeetCode Rating 1538; CodeChef 2-Star Coder; Machine Learning Specialization — Codebasics.io; Full Stack Web Development (MERN Stack)
HACKATHONS: DevOnboard — AI Repository Intelligence Platform (Individual); Smart Attendance System (Team Lead, 6-Member Team); SITNOVATE — Real-Time Chat Engine (Individual)
PUBLICATIONS: 

TARGET ROLES (priority order, derived from resume evidence): Generative AI Engineer, LLM Engineer, Backend Engineer, Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Data Scientist, ML Engineer
TARGET COMPANIES: no explicit preference — any reputable tech company
PREFERRED LOCATIONS: Nagpur, Remote India

ROLE TYPE EXCLUSIONS (this candidate wants HANDS-ON ENGINEERING work, NOT these):
AI content writing, prompt engineering for content/marketing, AI marketing/copywriting roles, non-technical AI trainer roles, data annotation without engineering component

HARD VETOES (auto-disqualify, each tied to resume evidence):
- IT services/outsourcing companies without AI/ML title (evidence: The candidate's profile is clearly AI/ML/product-engineering focused, and they have no experience in IT services/outsourcing companies)
- Roles requiring more than 2 years of experience (evidence: The candidate is a fresher with less than 2 years of experience)
